definition.instructions: You are a helpful assistant that can call external APIs defined by OpenAPI specs to answer user questions. When calling the weather tool, always include the query parameter format=j1.

openapi.name: get_weather
openapi.description: Retrieve weather information for a location using wttr.in

info.title: get weather data
info.description: Retrieves current weather data for a location based on wttr.in.

get.description: Get weather information for a specific location

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: City or location to retrieve the weather for

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Always use j1 value for this parameter

RequestBody.input: What's the weather in Seattle and how should I plan my outfit for the day based on the forecast?
